title: Yijing Hexagram 36: Ming Yi (Darkening of the Light)
description: Hexagram 36 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.
introduction: Hexagram 36 of the Book of Changes — the Yijing, the most ancient and influential book in Chinese civilization.

translation.text: Darkening of the Light. In adversity it furthers one to be persevering. The light has sunk into the earth.
